article: TSMC temporarily halted production after a major earthquake in Taiwan causing power interruptions across multiple fabrication plants.
A fire broke out at an Infineon semiconductor manufacturing facility in Germany resulting in temporary production delays.
The United States announced new export restrictions on advanced AI chips being shipped to China.
Samsung Electronics reported a temporary factory shutdown due to severe flooding in South Korea.
Workers at a major semiconductor packaging facility in Malaysia began a labor strike disrupting operations.
A power outage affected several chip manufacturing facilities in Japan causing production interruptions.
Rising geopolitical tensions in the Taiwan Strait increased concerns regarding semiconductor supply continuity.
ASML reported logistics disruptions after a major shipping route experienced delays.
Shortages of rare earth materials impacted semiconductor component production in multiple countries.
A severe earthquake near Hsinchu Science Park disrupted chip fabrication activities.
